violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at bottom tray in oven. -Minimal residue at handle of bakerlux. -Beef splatter at surfaces behind beef slicer.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Sandwich trays at make line are not covered or stroed inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. -Dust/debris at wall/ceiling at sandwich make line. -Debris/trash/residue below soda machine at drive through. -Dust/residue at ceiling vents. -Splatter at ceiling tiles above 3 compartment sink.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Small gap at bottom of kitchen door, light visible.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. -Oven interiors/drips pans have dried food residue. -Underside of make line handles have build up of debris. -Grease build up at green wire shelf at fryers.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Water faucet and sprayer at 3 comp sink leak and have heavy limescale build up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris and trash at floor of walk in cooler. -Residue at floor edges throughout, with heavy build up below 3 comp sink. -Debris below slicer prep table. -Dust/debris at ceiling tiles and ceiling vents .--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Cracked and damaged floor tiles in walk in cooler and walk in freezer.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -2 Wet mops were not hung up to dry, left in mop sink basin. *Corrected on-site by staff.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
